capture_method: Manual local replay against the committed boundary fixture and the extracted public-draft skill contract.

observed_output_sections.heading: current navigation problem
observed_output_sections.content: The replay answer treats the wordy text as secondary because the prompt's strongest signal is that users cannot tell which top-level destination owns pending work versus settings.

observed_output_sections.heading: proposed hub structure
observed_output_sections.content: The answer stays on a hub redesign with section ownership instead of drifting into pure copy cleanup.

observed_output_sections.heading: page ownership and migration map
observed_output_sections.content: The replay answer explains where reminder, connection, and pending-work entry points move, which is architectural rather than editorial.

observed_output_sections.heading: migration order
observed_output_sections.content: The answer sequences structure changes before text polishing, which validates the intended routing boundary over the copy skill.

notes: Boundary replay confirming that structural ownership problems outrank copy-only cleanup when both appear in the same prompt.
